creator: demon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello!

Can you please try to remove this patch and see if check_users works for =
you?

It seems that this patch was integrated.

Thanks!


On 10 =D0=B4=D0=B5=D0=BA. 2013 =D0=B3., at 19:49, olli hauer =
<ohauer@gmx.de> wrote:

> Hm,
>=20
> for 8.x users the port is now broken because
> files/extra-patch-plugins__check_users.c does not apply clean
>=20
>> /usr/ports/net-mgmt/nagios-plugins # uname -pr
> 8.4-RELEASE-p4 amd64
>=20
>=20
>> /usr/ports/net-mgmt/nagios-plugins # make patch
> ...
> =3D=3D=3D>  Patching for nagios-plugins-1.5,1
> =3D=3D=3D>  Applying extra patch =
/usr/svn_ports/net-mgmt/nagios-plugins/files/extra-patch-plugins__check_us=
ers.c
> 3 out of 3 hunks failed--saving rejects to plugins/check_users.c.rej
> *** Error code 3
>=20
> Stop in /usr/svn_ports/net-mgmt/nagios-plugins.
> *** Error code 1
>=20
> Stop in /usr/svn_ports/net-mgmt/nagios-plugins.
>=20
